operational_kernels.exercised_through: jax.jit over the full 6-case batch (genuine jit/vmap path)

oracle.type: single-column Fortran driver linked against UNMODIFIED pristine WRF module_bl_myjpbl.F + module_sf_myjsfc.F (reuses the v0.6.0 fp64 savepoints)

scheme: MYJ PBL (bl_pbl_physics=2) + Janjic Eta surface layer (sf_sfclay_physics=2)
tke_coupling: Faithful: the Janjic surface layer consumes the TKE-derived PBL height (MYJSFC q2 = qke = q^2) and the MYJ PBL writes the updated q^2 back to the qke leaf; bl=2/sf=2 are a mandatory pair (resolve_physics_suite raises if only one is selected).
